title: Shared scanner across 3 independent community labs — NOT MODELED
description: User's explicit example: three independent single-site labs sharing one scanner. Turoi has no multi-org pooling model. Closest workaround is to pretend it's a 3-site chain with no central HQ — that gives a lower-bound estimate but does NOT capture the per-institution capex saving from pooling, nor the inter-org IP/data governance friction. Expected outcome: the calculator produces a number that is a rough proxy; the finding is a feature request for a 'shared_infrastructure' section.

expected.notes: EXPECTED OUTCOME: Case runs and produces a number. The finding is that the number is a synthetic-chain proxy that: (a) undercounts because it can't reflect the per-org capex pooling (each org saves 2/3 of scanner cost vs buying solo), (b) overcounts commercial_growth because it assumes one legal-entity margin stack, (c) has no mechanism for inter-org governance friction. Outcome: feature request for shared_infrastructure section in WIZARD_SECTIONS.
